units.name: Intro to Survival
units.description: Core movements: shrimp, bridge, four points base. The building blocks of ground survival.

units.name: Frames
units.description: Creating structure against pressure. Frames from side control, mount, and bear hugs.

units.name: Grip Basics
units.description: Grip breaks, grip control, back mount seatbelt. The language of contact.

units.name: Escapes from Bottom (Side Control)
units.description: Thread the needle, side headlock defenses, regaining guard from cross body.

units.name: Mount Escapes
units.description: Upa, elbow escape, mounted punch defense, choke defense and bridge.

units.name: Timing & Reactions
units.description: Defense timing in standing situations: guillotines, rear chokes, guard choke defenses.

units.name: Side Control Attacks
units.description: Americana, Kimura, Neck Crank, Straight Armlock from cross body. Plus Knee on Belly.

units.name: Mount Attacks
units.description: Maintaining mount, Cross Choke, Armbar, Americana from top.

units.name: Back Attacks
units.description: Back control hooks, Rear Naked Choke, Collar Choke from back mount.

units.name: Guard Attacks
units.description: Cross Choke, Armbar, Triangle, Kimura, Guillotine from closed guard.

units.name: Guard Sweeps
units.description: Scissor Sweep, Hook Sweep, Sit-Up Sweep, Hip Bump Sweep from closed guard.

units.name: Guard Passing & Posture
units.description: Posture in guard, kneeling pass, standing pass, Toreando Pass. Sweep defense.
